title: Robert I of Burgundy becomes Duke of Burgundy
fact: Robert I, known as the Old or the Headstrong, was Duke of Burgundy from 1032 to his death.

title: Philip I becomes Duke of Burgundy
fact: Philip of Rouvres was the Count of Burgundy and Count of Artois from 1347, Duke of Burgundy from 1349, and Count of Auvergne and Boulogne from 1360.

title: Hugh IV, Duke of Burgundy becomes Duke of Burgundy
fact: Hugh IV was Duke of Burgundy from 1218 and titular King of Thessalonica from 1266 until his death in 1272.

title: Robert II of Burgundy becomes Duke of Burgundy
fact: Robert II was Duke of Burgundy between 1272 and 1306 as well as titular king of Thessalonica.

title: Odo I, Duke of Burgundy becomes Duke of Burgundy
fact: Odo I, also known as Eudes, surnamed Borel and called the Red, was duke of Burgundy between 1079 and 1102.

title: Hugh III, Duke of Burgundy becomes Duke of Burgundy
fact: Hugh III was Duke of Burgundy between 1162 and 1192.
